reviews.review_description:
​This game suffers from severe stuttering and lag whenever I move. It’s incredibly frustrating. The strange thing is, my frame counter shows a steady 90 FPS (even 120hz), yet I constantly experience screen jitter and input lag as if the frame rate were dropping significantly.
​This isn't a simple frame drop issue, but it severely ruins the experience—especially in VR—and causes motion sickness. Please fix this as soon as possible.

reviews.review_title: This game is so much fun 😭
reviews.review_description: Buying weapons and completing missions while destroying hotel rooms? Such a blast

reviews.review_title: fun but gets boring and repetitive later
reviews.review_description: Cool virtual rage room, but I think the part where security guard enter the room is dull in my opinion. I think instead of the game ending there should be more, like a fight between the police. Some games (in and out of VR) suffers from repetitiveness and could be much more creative and unique.
Gets boring once you get all the hotels
Love the game very cool
Its a great game i watched eddievr play this a while back so i bought it its a good game but heres a tip if you get the game get the hatchets they are great
It's just a janky rage room game everything feels terrible to use
Destroying a room helps me calm down and has multiple ways to wreak havoc and Khaos
IT DELETED EVERYTHING WHEN I GOT MY NEW VR HEADSET WTF I BEAT THE GAME AND HAD EVERYTHING!?!!?!?!? I moved it to a quest 3s from a quest 2

developer_response.body:
Hey, all of your save data should be on Meta's Cloud Backup. 
Update: We tested this between Quest 2 and 3 and it worked fine - weapons we unlocked on one transferred to the other no problem. There are some settings for the cloud sync: https://www.meta.com/en-gb/help/quest/articles/in-vr-experiences/oculus-features/cloud-sync/

reviews.review_title: Very deserving of a high rating
reviews.review_description: It’s a bizarre, fast paced hotel destroying simulator. It’s more fun than it needs to be. It just works really well.

When I was young I watched videos about this game and I thought it was the best and coolest thing ever!! This game is the reason why I bought VR and I'm so excited to be able to now play it for myself! I highly recommend this game to people who just want to destroy stuff in an awesome and satisfyingly fun way!  This game will always be so amazing and I will always be exited and ready for each and every update!!!

I've watched my favorite youtuber play this game eddievr 2 years ago, and ever since I wanted this game and finally in 2024, IT CAME OUT!!! and I bought it on October 12 and beat it in 2 days!!!  Really good destruction physics muah🇮🇹 and please add more hotels please I love playing this game!!🙏🙏🙏🙏🙏
Because the weapons does a lot of damage mostly the  lighter it doesn't set off alarms so the crackhead lady doesn't come with her cigar and developers you did perfect.⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐.
I love the game I think you guys should add more or add a second game

Hey I know this is a lot of text but just read it. So I beat the game and I feel like there’s not enough use for money, so I have an idea, what if when you break a tool for example the boxing glove, you would have to buy it again from the store but you keep the upgrade, but with items like guns you need to buy ammo,and maybe you could drink or eat to heal yourself up,and that you would lose money in the hospital bills, also I was thinking of a “police update” where if you punched the guard there would be police sirens and cops would enter the hotel and you’d have to beat waves of cops and you have to shoot them or punch them and dodge bullets or maybe give them melee weapons and guns, But you can escape only when you have defeated a certain amount of police waves, and also you could buy a police baton,assault rifle,pump shotgun and handcuffs and with the handcuffs you can make one of the staff like the maid and manager hostage, also the waves can include a swat team or just police officers, the whole reason I made up this police update is because it felt so weird just seeing a grenade flying from my face and just dying or something and that’s just boring and because I felt like there could be another use for guns or maybe just give us more time to get to the door, also maybe we could also reload guns with the bandoleer but developers I really hope you make a lot of my suggestions come true because it would make me  warm and happy from the heart to see and also you don’t have to make Everything true but it would be cool if you did add some of these things,anyways thank you for reading my suggestions.

Super fun, and no bugs, which is surprising for a new quest game! (I know that it’s been on pc.)
I definitely recommend for those who like destroying things, like me!!
There is TONS to do, including, mini games, different maps, a shop where you can buy/test items, and more!
Again, I definitely recommend.

developer_response.body: Love to hear it, thanks for your support!

developer_response.body: Thanks for joining us on the journey!

reviews.review_description: This has since a kid been one of my favorite vr games ever. And playing it now on the quest 2 feels no different. Performance is great and the game is amazing and feels good to play. Alot of content and love how almost everything is destructable and there's so many weapons. Tho as in the pc and psvr version I wish there was a mode where u just smashed stuff without the maid/sheriff. Easy 5/5

developer_response.body:
Awesome, thanks for the review! Sandbox mode is in this version, it's accessible from the TV in Backstage. It's been buried a bit since we added Mini-games to this menu.
It has the title "No Risk, No Reward" because you won't post to leaderboards or make money but the staff won't bother you... oh yeah and you can still die!

reviews.review_description:
Little back story: I have Anger issues. And now when ever i get mad i can just smash up Martin's Hotels:) (i think hes called Martin idk) The Gadgets Are very good too! Example: C4 and Black Hole. The pc vr version is a little better.... Mainly when Destroying Glass but oh well. 9.7/10. now a question for th
e devs: Whats The maid called?  That Lady that first comes to your door. i still don't know. Anyways, Great game!

Is a good game, but it’s kinda hard to beat the first level 

￼
This game might be the next frenzy VR ￼

reviews.review_title: One of the best games in my library
reviews.review_description: ￼ I have like 100 or more games in my library and this one is one of the top games that I have it has so much destruction which I love to get my anger out and before I got this game, let’s just say that I just put my anger out on a blanket now this game is what gets my rage out It’s hard sometimes because my battery just runs out when I’m doing like an objective mission or whatever you would like to call it anyway yeah so it’s one of the best games in my library so I think it’s actually really worth the $20 I spent for this so yeah you should get it so that’s the review and and make sure when you see this review, just buy it and remember, I think this one is refundable so if you don’t like it in the next like two hours, then you can refund it back and you’ll get your money. This is such a long review but it’s just so many things like they’re sandbox. There’s lots of items there’s a lot of upgrades. There’s lots of cool hotels and so what I’m trying to say is that you should buy Thank you￼.

Amazingly fresh and original - highly creative and interactive. Hilarious writing, great graphics and art style - really a game changer for me. Most fun I’ve ever had in VR. 

I’d recommend this to someone who enjoys interactive gameplay, comedy and rock n roll - it’s full of nostalgic humour and good vibes. Hats off to the developers as it was clearly made with a lot of love and passion.

developer_response.body: Fantastic name, fantastic review... thank you!
